Lyrics.text:
Ary, an-koatra ary,
Fanantenana soa.
Fonena-mamy doria
Fanantenana soa.
Ao hihaonantsika indray
Eo anatrehan'ny Ray,
Sambatra mandrakizay
Fanantenana soa

Ary, tapitra tokoa,
Fanantenana soa,
Tomany sy sento koa,
Fanantenana soa.
'Ndrey mamiratra er?
'Reo volamena ar?;
Lapa tsy fahita et?,
Fanantenana soa.

Henoy, feo manako re,
Fanantenana soa
Mireona toa rano be
Fanantenana soa!
Lokanga tsara feo,
Miharo antsa, maneho;
Lavi-tsento sy toreo
Fanantenana soa.

Ary, tsy ho ela izao,
Handray ilay lova ao,
Fanantenana soa
Kristy avy indray
Hampody antsika amin-dRay
Eny, ho mandrakizay!
He, fanantenana soa!
Fanantenana soa
